case_title: RESUIK, PAUL DBA SOFEWARE CENTER & HARDWARE VS KHOHLOV, VIKTOR DBA YERBA BUENA OFFICE SUPPLIES

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KHOHLOV, VIKTOR DBA YERBA BUENA OFFICE SUPPLIES

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,400.00 FILED BY RESUIK, PAUL DBA SOFEWARE CENTER & HARDWARE AS TO DEFENDANT KHOHLOV, VIKTOR DBA YERBA BUENA OFFICE SUPPLIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-1999 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RESUIK, PAUL DBA SOFEWARE CENTER & HARDWARE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KHOHLOV, VIKTOR DBA YERBA BUENA OFFICE SUPPLIES $4,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,455.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
